Class User

java.lang.Object
User
public class User extends Object
User class holds all the methods and variables that need to be stored for each user at the library. Holds information such as the name, id, list of borrowed books. Holds a constant for the maximum number of books that a user is allowed to borrow at once, which is 3.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_BORROW

      public static final int MAX_BORROW
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String id, String name)
      User constructor. Each user is provided an id and a name which is updated here. Sets the user id as the id input and the name as the name input as default. Creates a new, empty ArrayList for each user for the list of books that they have borrowed. This list keeps track of the books that they are currently borrowing.
      Parameters:
      id - The identification number of the user for this account.
      name - The name of the user trying to make an account.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the user. Does this by accessing the name of the user that was created in the constructor.
      Returns:
      The name of the user.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the ID of the user that was provided in the constructor as a parameter.
      Returns:
      The user's ID.

    • addBorrowedBook

      public boolean addBorrowedBook(Book book)
      Adds a book to the user's borrowed book list if the book can be borrowed. Checks if the user has less than the maximum number of books that they can borrow and if they do, then they can borrow the book. This gets updated by adding the book to the user's borrowed book list.
      Parameters:
      book - The book that the user wants to borrow.
      Returns:
      Either true or false if the user can or cannot borrow the book.

    • removeBorrowedBook

      public void removeBorrowedBook(Book book)
      Removes a book from the user's borrowedBooks ArrayList
      Parameters:
      book - The book that will be removed from the user's borrowedBook list.

    • getBorrowedCount

      public int getBorrowedCount()
      Returns the size of the ArrayList for the books borrowed by the user. Does this by using the .siz() method.
      Returns:
      The size of the user's borrowedBooks ArrayList.

    • hasBorrowed

      public boolean hasBorrowed(Book book)
      Checks if the book has been borrowed by a user or not. Done by checking if the book matches anything in the user's borrwedBooks list.
      Parameters:
      book - The book that will be used to check if the user has borrowed it or not.
      Returns:
      Either ture or false depending on if the book input was found in the user's borrowedBooks.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] arguments)
      Main function of user. Can be used to test any test cases.
      Parameters:
      arguments - The argument inputs from the command line.
